115.text: A dedicated and focused learner, he/she take initiative and complete all tasks with excellence
Performs with confidence, demonstrating a strong grasp of concepts and applying them effectively
Shows strong potential and makes consistent efforts in academics — encouraged to continue with the same zeal
A sincere effort is evident; with more focused attention, can achieve even greater success — keep pushing forward
Basic concepts are clear; with regular practice and focus on deeper understanding, performance will surely improve
Basic concepts are clear; with regular practice and focus on deeper understanding, performance will surely improve
Efforts are appreciated; improvement is possible with better focus and time management — needs guidance and extra practice

default.text: THE HARD WORK IS PAYING OFF ! HAS DONE A GREAT JOB FACING AND OVERCOMING CHALLENGES. PLEASE CONTINUE TO NURTURE AND ENCOURAGE THIS BEHAVIOUR AT HOME
HAS THE POTENTIAL TO BE AT THE TOP OF THE CLASS, WITH LITTLE MORE EFFORT HE/SHE CAN MOVE UP TO THE TOP LIST.
WOULD BENEFIT IF HE/SHE SHOWS GREATER INTEREST IN CLASS AND LESSONS. PLEASE ENCOURAGE TO DEMONSTRATE MORE RESPONSIBLE ATTITUDE & BEHAVIOUR IN CLASSROOM.
NEEDS TO DEMONSTRATE IMPROVEMENT IN ACADEMIC WORK IF HE/SHE WANTS IMPROVED GRADES. WOULD BENEFIT FROM SUPERVISION OF HOMEWORK.
REQUIRES ENCOURAGEMENT TO PERFORM BETTER.NEEDS FREQUENT REMINDERS TO BE ATTENTIVE DURING INSTRUCTIONS AND LESSONS.
NEEDS TO SHOW THAT HE/ SHE IS PROPERLY ENGAGED IN THE LEARNING PROCESS BY SHOWING BETTER QUALITY OF WORK AND USE OF CLASS TIME.
MAY NEED ADDITIONAL ASSISTANCE IN STUDYING , COMPLETING CLASSWORK AND HOMEWORK REGULARLY IS THE FIRST STEP TO IMPROVING. WE WILL CONTINUE TO REINFORCE HIS/HER POSITIVE EFFORTS.
